ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-27-2005 Continued To Dec-28-05 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Nov-03-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lori Cheshire.
Paul K. Lee, Esq. for Plaintiff: 68 Harriet Street Homeowners' Association.
Plaintiff's Witness: Suzan Rollins, present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: J. Andrew Knorr as follows:
Past due Assessments, late charges and interest $3,029.01
Attorney's Fees $929.50
Costs $961.30, for a total of $4,919.81
See details in scanned doc.
Judgment signed in open court.
